data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes a microservices architecture to manage different functionalities independently.
data.technical_spec: Employs containerization technologies like Kubernetes and Docker.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Leverages global CDN for efficient video streaming and reducing latency.
data.technical_spec: Partnered with multiple CDN providers across data centers worldwide.

data.title: Scalable Data Storage
data.description: Manages petabytes of video data with scalable cloud storage solutions.
data.technical_spec: Uses distributed NoSQL databases for metadata and object storage.

data.title: APIs and SDKs
data.description: Offers APIs and SDKs for third-party integrations and app development.
data.technical_spec: RESTful services with OAuth 2.0 authentication for access control.

data.title: Real-time Streaming Protocols
data.description: Supports live streaming with low latency and high-quality resolution.
data.technical_spec: Uses WebRTC and HLS protocols to facilitate streaming services.
